name: Swarm Drone Show Vehicle Commissioning
description: You are a Fleet Manager for Entertainment Swarm Alpha. Drone #42 needs to be commissioned for tonight's drone show. Based on the commissioning brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/swarm_spec_sheet.txt, configure the 8 required safety parameters to the specified 'Land in place' behaviors. Export the full parameter list to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/vehicle42_show.params and write a sign-off report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/signoff.txt stating that Vehicle 42 has been commissioned and its failsafes are set to 'Land in place'.
